input_text: Mark is not in the box. Eve planned to travel. Estonia is not outside Europe. The students studied hard and passed the exam. Tallinn is a city. Jessica is a mouse. There is a ghost in the room. The dog chased by the boy escaped. The rain continued. The red car is faster than the blue car. A big bear was strong. Mary washed and dried the cup. John smokes with a probability 90 percent. The guide offered the tourists tea. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. The cat sat on the mat and purred. A chocolate cake fell. Is the green car faster than the red car?
